description_long: This is a rectangular table with a light wood-grain top and four black metal legs, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance. On the tabletop, there is a computer setup consisting of a flat-screen monitor, a keyboard, and a mouse, as well as a printed document or form placed to the right. The table's surface is smooth and unadorned, with visible wood grain patterns and no decorative elements. The legs are straight and sturdy, made of metal, and are attached at each corner for stability. The computer monitor is slim and dark-colored, and the keyboard and mouse are standard office peripherals. This setup is typical for workstations found in public spaces, libraries, or urban offices.
description: A modern rectangular table with a light wood-grain top and black metal legs, featuring a computer setup and a document on its surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim profile of the monitor, keyboard, and mouse on the light wood tabletop.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the monitor and the sturdy black metal legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the keyboard and the wood grain pattern on the tabletop.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the computer screen, keyboard, mouse, and a document on the right side of the tabletop.
